title: Open the app and verify the header
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Verify the presence of the DBS logo in the header | Verify the presence of the menu icon on the left | Verify the presence of the 'Edit' option on the right
expected_result: The DBS logo is visible in the header | The menu icon is visible on the left | The 'Edit' option is visible on the right

title: Navigate through the service icons
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Tap on the 'PayLah!' icon | Tap on the 'Vickers Trading' icon | Tap on the 'iWealth' icon | Tap on the 'Lifestyle' icon
expected_result: The 'PayLah!' screen is displayed | The 'Vickers Trading' screen is displayed | The 'iWealth' screen is displayed | The 'Lifestyle' screen is displayed

title: Verify the indices section
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Verify the Nasdaq index value is 5,715.18 | Verify the note 'NA' is displayed
expected_result: The Nasdaq index value is 5,715.18 | The note 'NA' is displayed

title: Verify the currencies section
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Verify the GBP/SGD exchange rate is 1.7763 | Verify the change is 0.1%
expected_result: The GBP/SGD exchange rate is 1.7763 | The change is 0.1%

title: Verify the currency converter button
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Tap on the currency converter button | Verify the currency converter screen is displayed
expected_result: The currency converter screen is displayed

title: Verify the 'Get in Touch' section
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Tap on the phone icon in the 'Get in Touch' section | Tap on the calendar icon in the 'Get in Touch' section | Tap on the location icon in the 'Get in Touch' section
expected_result: The phone screen is displayed | The calendar screen is displayed | The location screen is displayed

title: Verify the 'DBS Asian Insights' section
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Tap on the 'View all' option in the 'DBS Asian Insights' section
expected_result: The 'DBS Asian Insights' screen is displayed

title: Verify the 'Edit' option in the header
preconditions: The app is installed and opened
test_steps: Open the app | Tap on the 'Edit' option in the header | Verify the edit screen is displayed
